Act I & Act II

The Itinerary

Rhodes is one hour ahead of German time (CEST +1). All times are local. Pure flight time: about 3½ hours.

Outbound — Tuesday, September 29, 2026

Home → Düsseldorf → Rhodes → Stegna
DUSdep 14:05
✈ EW 1234 · ≈ 3½ h
RHOarr 18:25 local
  • ~11:15tentative
    🚐
    NRW Shuttle picks us up at home
    Pickup right at the front door · child seats for Emma & Theo confirmed · luggage: 4 large + 2 small suitcases. Exact pickup time still to be confirmed by NRW Shuttle — booked as “arrive at airport by 12:05”.
  • 12:05
    🧳
    Arrival at Düsseldorf Airport
    2-hour buffer · bag drop (6 suitcases à 23 kg) · airport check-in service booked for everyone.
  • 14:05
    ✈️
    Departure EW 1234 to Rhodes
    Eurowings · booking code ABC123 · entire row 10 (seats B–F) · Theo flies as a lap infant.
  • 18:25local
    🛬
    Landing at Rhodes (Diagoras)
    Back in Germany it will be 17:25.
  • ~18:50
    🚐
    Private minibus to the hotel
    hoppa / Elife · ref. R1234567 · approx. 40 min to Stegna. Careful: the booking says “pick-up 14:05” — that is the German departure time. Double-check the e-ticket (arrives ~Sep 22).
  • ~19:30
    🏨
    Check-in Porto Angeli Beach Resort
    Balance due: €1,505.00* (Miller family) + €1,155.00* (Uta & Klaus) — reception issues two separate receipts anyway, one per room. Then: all-inclusive dinner.

Return — Tuesday, October 13, 2026

Stegna → Rhodes → Düsseldorf → Home
RHOdep 19:20 local
✈ EW 1235 · ≈ 3½ h
DUSarr 21:55
  • ~12:00
    🛎️
    Check-out
    Pickup is not until 16:40 — asking for late check-out is worth it; otherwise use the luggage room and spend the last day on the beach (all inclusive applies until departure).
  • 16:40
    🚐
    hoppa minibus from the hotel
    approx. 40 min to the airport · arrival ~17:20, a good 2 hours before departure.
  • 19:20local
    ✈️
    Departure EW 1235 to Düsseldorf
    Row 10 again · at take-off it is 18:20 in Germany.
  • 21:55CEST
    🛬
    Landing in Düsseldorf
    Grab the luggage — the shuttle will be waiting.
  • ~22:40
    🚐
    NRW Shuttle home
    Cash payment on site: €200.00 total (both rides), unless already paid on the way out. Home around 23:30.
The Journey

The Route

From Home via Düsseldorf across the Balkans into the Aegean — 2,363 km as the crow flies, about 3½ hours of pure flight time. The map travels as you scroll: shuttle, flight, minibus.

From the front door to the beach

NRW Shuttle → EW 1234 → hoppa minibus · out on September 29, back on October 13
 
The Destination

What it looks like

Stegna is a small swimming bay on the east coast of Rhodes, framed by cliffs — calm, gently shelving, perfect for the kids. And for a day trip: Mandraki Harbour in Rhodes Town.

Day Trips

Exploring Rhodes

Seven spots, all easy to reach from Stegna — tap a pin and the map flies there. Drive times are rough car estimates from Stegna.

Tap a pin

From the UNESCO old town to the Valley of the Butterflies — every pin knows the drive time and why the trip is worth it.

The Cast

Six travelers, two families

Four adults and two kids — all on the same flights, in the same hotel, in the same minibus.

The Paperwork

Four bookings, all confirmed

All reference numbers and terms at a glance — for the travel folder and for emergencies.

Flight

€2,200.00
Booking code ABC123 · booked Jan 18, 2026 · paid (PayPal)
  • EW 1234 · 29.09. · DUS 14:05 → RHO 18:25 · SMART fare
  • EW 1235 · 13.10. · RHO 19:20 → DUS 21:55 · SMART fare
  • 6 × checked bags 23 kg (incl. family allowance) + 5 × large cabin bags
  • Flex Light & airport check-in service for everyone · online check-in from 72 h before

Hotel

€5,320.00
Stegna, Rhodes · 14 nights all inclusive · deposit of €2,660* paid
  • 50% prepaid rate: deposit non-refundable, balance at check-in
  • Family Room Sea View (2 adults + 2 kids) & Double Room Mountain View (2 adults)
  • Climate tax: €15 per night and room (€420 total, included in the sum)
  • Contact: reception · sales@portoangeli.com · +30 22440 24000

Transfer on Rhodes

€150.00
Ref. R1234567 · operated by Elife · paid (Marco)
  • Private minibus (up to 8 people), max. 8 bags
  • Out: Sep 29 from the airport · back: Oct 13, 16:40 from the hotel · ~40 min each way
  • E-ticket arrives 7 days before travel (~Sep 22) by email
  • Cancellation within 48 h of the ride: 100% fee · a 25% discount was included
🚐

Transfer NRW · Shuttle Service

€200.00
Door ↔ Düsseldorf Airport, standard rate · open — cash on site
  • Out: Sep 29, arriving at the airport 12:05 · back: Oct 13 after the 21:55 landing
  • 2 child seats confirmed (for Emma, 4, and Theo, 1)
  • Luggage registered: 4 large + 2 small suitcases
  • Price covers both rides together

  1. Hotel balance at reception, Sep 29Two separate receipts — each family pays for its own room directly.
    €1,505* + €1,155*

Before the curtain rises

Open Items

None of it is urgent — but all of it should be done before September 29.

  • Check the hoppa pickup time: The booking says “pick-up 14:05”, but landing is only at 18:25 local time. Verify on the e-ticket (~Sep 22), otherwise contact hoppa.
  • Child seats for the hoppa transfer: Confirmed with NRW Shuttle, not noted in the hoppa booking — request them for Emma and Theo with hoppa/Elife.
  • Confirm the deposit amount: Once the hotel’s confirmation email arrives, verify the exact amount — the * amounts here become final.
  • Plan for €200 in cash: For the NRW Shuttle, paid on site.
  • Ask for the NRW pickup time: Only “arrive at airport 12:05” is booked — the exact home pickup time is still to come from the shuttle service.
  • Ask for late check-out: On Oct 13 the flight only leaves at 19:20 — keeping the room into the afternoon would be golden.
  • Check the passports: Check all six travelers’ documents for validity — Emma and Theo need their own too.
Key dates: Sep 22 hoppa e-ticket arrives · Sep 26 from 14:05 online check-in outbound · Sep 27/28 cash & suitcases · Oct 10 from 18:20 CEST online check-in return

The road to departure

The golden dot is today — it moves a little closer to the plane every day
The Suitcase

Packing List

A shared list for all six — this standalone copy shows a frozen snapshot; the live, editable version runs on the family home server.

Snapshot of the live list · July 22, 2026 · 0 of 48 packed
Documents & Money
  • 🛂Passports/ID cards
  • ✈️Flight tickets/Boarding passes (digital/printed)
  • 🏨Hotel booking confirmation
  • 💳Credit cards/Debit cards
  • 💶Cash (Euros)
  • 🏥Health insurance cards
  • 💉Vaccination record
Clothing
  • 👕Light clothing (T-shirts, tops)
  • 🩳Trousers/Shorts/Skirts
  • 👗Dresses/Summer dresses
  • 👙Swimwear (multiple sets)
  • 🧥Light jacket/Sweater for cooler evenings
  • 🧦Underwear and socks
Beach & Sun
  • 🤿Goggles Marco
  • 🤿Goggles Emma
  • 🧴Sunscreen Bianca's face
  • 👒Headwear (hats, caps)
  • 🕶️Sunglasses
  • 👜Small beach bag
  • 🏖️Sand toys
  • 🧴After-sun lotion
Toiletries
  • 🦷Toothbrushes & toothpaste
  • 🧴Shower gel/Shampoo/Conditioner
  • 🧻Wet wipes (for kids and general use)
  • 🦟Insect repellent
  • 🧻Wet wipes (extra for the trip)
Medication
  • 💊Personal medication
  • 🩹First-aid kit (band-aids, disinfectant)
Kids
  • 👶Diapers Theo
  • 👶Baby carrier
  • 🍼Pacifier/Bottle
  • 🧸Toys for the flight
  • 👕UV clothing kids
  • 🤱Baby carrier/Sling for Theo
  • 🍎Toddler snacks for on the go
  • 📱Baby monitor (if needed)
  • 🧸Toddler sleeping bag/Comfort toy
  • 👶Diapers and wet wipes (large supply for Theo)
  • 🛴Travel stroller/Buggy (if needed)
Tech
  • 🔌Power bank/Chargers
  • 🎧Headphones (for the flight)
  • 📱iPad
  • 🎒Headphones Emma
Travel & Flight
  • ✈️Emma's travel pillow for plane
  • ✈️Neck pillow for the flight
  • 🧸Small games/Books for the kids (for flight and hotel)
Misc
  • 🥨Small snacks for the flight
  • 🛍️Resealable bags (various sizes)
